name: vlaina
description: This could be a magic book~
author: vladelaina

scripts.dev:electron: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs dev:electron && pnpm run prepare:preload && wait-on tcp:3000 && electron .
scripts.start: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs start && pnpm run prepare:preload && electron .
scripts.build: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs build && tsc && vite build
scripts.build:renderer: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs build:renderer && tsc && vite build
scripts.build:web: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs build:web && tsc && vite build
scripts.package:desktop: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs package:desktop && pnpm run prepare:preload && pnpm run prepare:desktop-assets && pnpm build && pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.package:win: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs package:win && pnpm run prepare:preload && pnpm run prepare:desktop-assets && pnpm build && pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win --publish never
scripts.package:mac: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs package:mac && pnpm run prepare:preload && pnpm run prepare:desktop-assets && pnpm build && pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac --publish never
scripts.package:linux: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs package:linux && pnpm run prepare:preload && pnpm run prepare:desktop-assets && pnpm build && pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux --publish never
scripts.test:language-detection: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs test:language-detection && pnpm exec vitest run src/components/Notes/features/Editor/utils/languageDetection/*.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs test:e2e && playwright test -c playwright.e2e.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs test:e2e:smoke && playwright test -c playwright.e2e.config.ts test/e2e/app.layoutSmoke.spec.ts test/e2e/sidebar.hoverPrefetch.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:notes: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs test:e2e:notes && playwright test -c playwright.e2e.config.ts test/e2e/notes.*.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:notes:typewriter-audit: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs test:e2e:notes:typewriter-audit && playwright test -c playwright.e2e.config.ts test/e2e/notes.typingCaretPosition.spec.ts --repeat-each=3
scripts.test:e2e:notes:block-selection-audit: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs test:e2e:notes:block-selection-audit && playwright test -c playwright.e2e.config.ts test/e2e/notes.blockSelection.spec.ts test/e2e/notes.blockSelection.lists.spec.ts test/e2e/notes.blockSelectionChaosAudit.spec.ts test/e2e/notes.blankLineCaret.spec.ts --repeat-each=3
scripts.test:e2e:notes:perf: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs test:e2e:notes:perf && playwright test -c playwright.e2e.config.ts test/e2e/notes.blockSelectionPerformance.spec.ts test/e2e/notes.calloutIconPickerPerformance.spec.ts test/e2e/notes.createNotePerformance.spec.ts test/e2e/notes.interactionLoopPerformance.spec.ts test/e2e/notes.largeMarkdownInteractionPerformance.spec.ts test/e2e/notes.malformedMarkdownPerformance.spec.ts test/e2e/notes.manualInputPerformance.spec.ts test/e2e/notes.manualPerformance.spec.ts test/e2e/notes.markdownSyntaxPerformance.spec.ts test/e2e/notes.openPerformance.spec.ts test/e2e/notes.randomInteractionPerformance.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:chat: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs test:e2e:chat && playwright test -c playwright.e2e.config.ts test/e2e/chat.*.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:settings: node scripts/ensure-not-wsl.mjs test:e2e:settings && playwright test -c playwright.e2e.config.ts test/e2e/settings.interactionCoverage.spec.ts test/e2e/settings.aiChannelReorder.spec.ts test/e2e/preferences.multiWindow.spec.ts
scripts.quality:verify: pnpm run quality:electron-only && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm build
